jobs.title: Sustainability Specialist
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: VF Corporation is looking for a Sustainability Specialist to join our Global Sustainability team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As a Sustainability Specialist , you’ll be working across VF and its portfolio of brands to drive transformative change in alignment with our Global Sustainability strategy and forthcoming regulatory requirements, with a particular emphasis on support to Brand sustainability operations. This role will be central to driving progress globally that contributes to VF’s global sustainability goals and prepares VF brands for sustainability-related regulatory compliance. The role will require adept relationship building skills across both internal and external stakeholders, giving you the opportunity to engage in multiple workstreams across VF’s organization. The Sustainability Specialist will be working closely with the VF Brands to support on the implementation of strategically relevant sustainability initiatives and processes. We expect that you will deliver exceptional results while fulfilling the following aspects of the Sustainability Analyst role: - Support on packaging initiatives across EMEA Brands, leading the implementation of existing programs & identifying, planning and executing new improvement opportunities across Brands in collaboration with internal stakeholder network, all in close alignment with eco-modulation opportunities globally foreseen by regulation. - Support VF Brands and commercial teams in fulfilling product sustainability surveys and data requests for key commercial partners. - Advising VF Brands on environmental claims and messaging, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements in EMEA (including but not limited to Empowering Consumers for the Green Transition Directive) - Support the team in the integration of circular economy principles into the day-to-day business, including support on data collection to ensure compliance with Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation ( ESPR) and Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) - Continuously monitor the evolving landscape of sustainability-focused regulatory requirements globally. - Support on team organization, planning, and day-to-day operational tasks. Critical work relationships: - Work horizontally across internal functions, incl. but not exclusive to Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Brand Product & Sales teams, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship team as well as external stakeholders - Work closely with Corporate & Government Affairs and Legal Counsel to continuously integrate regulatory developments into the VF operational process. Skills for Success We are looking for someone who: - A few years of work experience in sustainability, experience in the textile industry is a plus. - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Has excellent analytical skills & process thinking to translate complex issues into tangible & streamlined solutions. - Has deep expertise in data collection and analytics, process management and project management. - Has the ability to successfully support and prioritize multiple projects and teams at one time. - Has a pioneering spirit and feels confident in their ability to charter unchartered territory. - Is a strong communicator and enjoys working with people. - Has a keen interest in Sustainability, Climate Change, and the complex, interrelated environmental challenges faced by our industry and beyond. About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione VF Corporation è alla ricerca di uno Specialista in Sostenibilità per unirsi al nostro team Global Sustainability con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. Parliamo del ruolo! Come Specialista della Sostenibilità, lavorerai con VF e il suo portafoglio di brand per promuovere cambiamenti trasformativi in linea con la nostra strategia globale di sostenibilità e i prossimi requisiti normativi, con particolare attenzione al supporto alle operazioni di sostenibilità del Brand. Questo ruolo sarà centrale per guidare progressi a livello globale che contribuiscano agli obiettivi globali di sostenibilità di VF e preparino i marchi VF alla conformità normativa relativa alla sostenibilità. Il ruolo richiederà competenze esperte nella costruzione di relazioni sia tra stakeholder interni che esterni, offrendoti l'opportunità di partecipare a molteplici flussi di lavoro all'interno dell'organizzazione di VF. Lo Specialista della Sostenibilità lavorerà a stretto contatto con i VF Brands per supportare l'implementazione di iniziative e processi di sostenibilità strategicamente rilevanti. Ci aspettiamo che tu possa offrire risultati eccezionali pur svolgendo i seguenti aspetti del ruolo di Analista di Sostenibilità: ## Mansioni - Supporto alle iniziative di packaging in tutti i marchi EMEA, guidando l'implementazione dei programmi esistenti e identificando, pianificando ed attuando nuove opportunità di miglioramento tra i brand in collaborazione con la rete interna degli stakeholder, tutto in stretta allineamento con le opportunità di eco-modulazione previste a livello globale dalla regolamentazione. - Supportare i marchi VF e i team commerciali nel soddisfare sondaggi sulla sostenibilità dei prodotti e nelle richieste di dati per i principali partner commerciali. - Consigliare i marchi VF su affermazioni e messaggi ambientali, assicurando la conformità ai requisiti normativi in EMEA (inclusi, ma non limitati a, Empowering Consumers for the Green Transition Directive) - Supportare il team nell'integrazione dei principi dell'economia circolare nel business quotidiano, incluso il supporto nella raccolta dati per garantire la conformità con l'Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation (ESPR) e la Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) - Monitoraggio continuo il panorama in evoluzione dei requisiti normativi focalizzati sulla sostenibilità a livello globale. - Supporto nell'organizzazione del team, nella pianificazione e nelle attività operative quotidiane. ## Relazioni di lavoro critiche - Lavorare orizzontalmente tra le funzioni interne, inclusi ma non esclusivi per i team di Sostenibilità Globale, Legale, Marketing del Brand, Prodotto e Vendite del Brand, Finanza, Affari Governativi, Supply Chain, Team Product Stewardship e stakeholder esterni - Collaborare strettamente con Corporate & Government Affairs e Consulenza Legale per integrare continuamente gli sviluppi normativi nel processo operativo VF. ## Competenze richieste - Qualche anno di esperienza lavorativa nella sostenibilità, esperienza nell'industria tessile è un vantaggio. - Fluente in inglese con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione orale e scritta. - Possiede eccellenti capacità analitiche e pensiero di processo per tradurre questioni complesse in soluzioni tangibili e snelle. - Ha una profonda esperienza nella raccolta e analisi dei dati, nella gestione dei processi e nella gestione dei progetti. - Ha la capacità di supportare e dare priorità con successo a più progetti e team contemporaneamente. - Ha uno spirito pionieristico e si sente sicuro della propria capacità di esplorare territori inesplorati. - È un comunicatore forte e ama lavorare con le persone. - Ha un vivo interesse per la sostenibilità, il cambiamento climatico e le complesse e interconnesse sfide ambientali che il nostro settore e oltre. ## Informazioni su VF VF è un'azienda globale di abbigliamento che collega le persone agli stili di vita che amano attraverso la nostra famiglia di marchi iconici. Al centro del nostro percorso c'è il nostro scopo: alimentiamo movimenti di stili di vita sostenibili e attivi per il miglioramento delle persone e del nostro pianeta. Questo è il nostro scopo. Cosa ci guadagni Per te? Siamo nel business di liberare il potenziale umano, guidati dalle idee, dall'energia e dall'impegno del nostro popolo. Ecco perché offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario di tutti i collaboratori VF. Per quanto riguarda i benefit, siamo il pacchetto completo. ## Cosa offriamo - Una cultura di supporto basata sul feedback dove rispetto e integrità ci guidano in ciò che facciamo - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo dove persone di background, stili di vita e nazionalità diversi amano lavorare insieme - Far parte di un marchio iconico di lifestyle in un'organizzazione multibrand e multi-paese - Palestre sul posto che offre iniziative di salute e benessere - Una carta sconto con il 50% su tutti i marchi VF - Aree di relax che offrono bevande calde gratuite ## Free to Be, Inclusione e Diversità In qualità di datore di lavoro che offre pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri collaboratori, permettendo loro di portare ogni giorno il loro vero sé al lavoro. ## Contatto Se ti è piaciuto quello che hai letto e vuoi unirti al nostro team, vorremmo sentirti! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung VF Corporation sucht einen Sustainability Specialist, der unserem Global Sustainability Team in Stabio, Schweiz beitritt. Lassen Sie uns über die Rolle sprechen! Als Sustainability Specialist arbeiten Sie über VF und sein Markenportfolio hinweg, um transformative Veränderungen im Einklang mit unserer Global Sustainability Strategie und den kommenden regulatorischen Anforderungen voranzutreiben, mit besonderem Schwerpunkt auf die Unterstützung der Nachhaltigkeitsoperationen der Marken. Diese Rolle wird zentral sein, um weltweit Fortschritte zu erzielen, die zu den globalen Nachhaltigkeitszielen von VF beitragen und die VF-Marken auf die regulatorische Einhaltung im Bereich Nachhaltigkeit vorbereiten. Die Rolle erfordert ausgeprägte Fähigkeiten im Beziehungsaufbau zu internen und externen Stakeholdern und gibt Ihnen die Möglichkeit, sich an mehreren Arbeitsströmen innerhalb der VF-Organisation zu beteiligen. Der Sustainability Specialist arbeitet eng mit den VF-Marken zusammen, um die Umsetzung strategisch relevanter Nachhaltigkeitsinitiativen und -prozesse zu unterstützen. Wir erwarten, dass Sie außergewöhnliche Ergebnisse liefern und gleichzeitig die folgenden Aspekte der Rolle des Sustainability Analyst erfüllen: ## Aufgaben - Unterstützung bei Verpackungsinitiativen über EMEA-Marken hinweg, Leitung der Implementierung bestehender Programme & Identifizierung, Planung und Umsetzung neuer Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten über Marken hinweg in Zusammenarbeit mit dem internen Stakeholder-Netzwerk, alles in enger Abstimmung mit globalen, regulatorisch vorhergesehenen Eco-Modulationsmöglichkeiten. - Unterstützung der VF-Marken und der kommerziellen Teams bei der Erfüllung von Produkt-Nachhaltigkeitsumfragen und Datenanfragen für wichtige kommerzielle Partner. - Beratung der VF-Marken zu Umweltansprüchen und Botschaften, um die Einhaltung der regulatorischen Anforderungen in EMEA sicherzustellen (einschließlich, aber nicht beschränkt auf die Empowering Consumers for the Green Transition Directive). - Unterstützung des Teams bei der Integration von Prinzipien der Kreislaufwirtschaft in den Tagesgeschäft, einschließlich Unterstützung bei der Datenerfassung, um die Einhaltung der Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation (ESPR) und der Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) sicherzustellen. - Kontinuierliche Überwachung der sich entwickelnden Landschaft von nachhaltigkeitsorientierten regulatorischen Anforderungen weltweit. - Unterstützung bei der Teamorganisation, Planung und täglichen operativen Aufgaben. ## Kritische Arbeitsbeziehungen - Horizontal arbeiten über interne Funktionen hinweg, einschließlich, aber nicht ausschließlich, Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Brand Product & Sales Teams, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship Team sowie externe Stakeholder. - Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Corporate & Government Affairs und Legal Counsel, um regulatorische Entwicklungen kontinuierlich in den VF-Betriebsprozess zu integrieren. ## Erforderliche Kompetenzen - Einige Jahre Berufserfahrung im Bereich Nachhaltigkeit, Erfahrung in der Textilindustrie ist von Vorteil. - Fließend in Englisch mit exzellenten mündlichen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Ausgezeichnete analytische Fähigkeiten & Prozessdenken, um komplexe Themen in greifbare & optimierte Lösungen zu übersetzen. - Tiefgehende Expertise in Datenerfassung und -analyse, Prozessmanagement und Projektmanagement. - Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte und Teams gleichzeitig erfolgreich zu unterstützen und zu priorisieren. - Ein Pioniergeist und Selbstvertrauen, unbekanntes Terrain zu erkunden. - Starker Kommunikator, der gerne mit Menschen arbeitet. - Starkes Interesse an Nachhaltigkeit, Klimawandel und den komplexen, miteinander verknüpften Umweltproblemen, denen unsere Branche und darüber hinaus ausgesetzt ist. ## Über VF VF ist ein globales Bekleidungsunternehmen, das Menschen mit den Lebensstilen verbindet, die sie schätzen, durch unsere Familie ikonischer Marken. Im Herzen unserer Reise liegt unser Zweck: Wir treiben Bewegungen nachhaltiger und aktiver Lebensstile zum Wohle von Menschen und unserem Planeten voran. Das ist unser Zweck. Was gibt es für Sie? Wir sind im Geschäft, menschliches Potenzial freizusetzen, angetrieben von den Ideen, der Energie und dem Engagement unserer Menschen. Deshalb bieten wir umfassende Leistungen, die das mentale, körperliche und finanzielle Wohlbefinden aller VF-Mitarbeiter fördern. Wenn es um Leistungen geht, sind wir das komplette Paket. ## Was wir anbieten - Eine unterstützende, feedbackbasierte Kultur, in der Respekt und Integrität uns leiten. - Ein inklusives internationales Umfeld, in dem Menschen unterschiedlicher Hintergründe, Lebensstile und Nationalitäten gerne zusammenarbeiten. - Teil einer ikonischen Lifestyle-Marke in einer Multi-Brand, Multi-Country-Organisation sein. - Vor Ort Fitnessstudio mit Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen. - Eine Rabattkarte mit 50% auf alle VF-Marken. - Breakout-Bereiche mit kostenlosen heißen Getränken. ## Freiheit zu sein, Inklusion & Vielfalt Als Arbeitgeber mit Chancengleichheit streben wir danach, eine Kultur des Zugehörigkeitsgefühls zu fördern, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen und aufrechtzuerhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert und ihnen ermöglicht, jeden Tag ihr authentisches Selbst zur Arbeit zu bringen. ## Kontakt Wenn Ihnen das, was Sie gelesen haben, gefällt und Sie unserem Team beitreten möchten, würden wir gerne von Ihnen hören! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description VF Corporation recherche un Spécialiste de la Durabilité pour rejoindre notre équipe mondiale de durabilité basée à Stabio, en Suisse. Parlons du poste ! En tant que Spécialiste de la Durabilité, vous travaillerez à travers VF et son portefeuille de marques pour conduire un changement transformateur en accord avec notre stratégie mondiale de durabilité et les exigences réglementaires à venir, avec un accent particulier sur le soutien aux opérations de durabilité des marques. Ce rôle sera central pour faire progresser les objectifs mondiaux de durabilité de VF et préparer les marques VF à la conformité réglementaire liée à la durabilité. Le rôle nécessitera des compétences de construction de relations solides avec les parties prenantes internes et externes, vous donnant l'opportunité de participer à plusieurs flux de travail au sein de l'organisation VF. Le Spécialiste de la Durabilité travaillera en étroite collaboration avec les marques VF pour soutenir la mise en œuvre d'initiatives et de processus de durabilité stratégiquement pertinents. Nous attendons de vous que vous obteniez des résultats exceptionnels tout en remplissant les aspects suivants du rôle d'Analyste de la Durabilité : ## Missions - Soutien aux initiatives d'emballage à travers les marques EMEA, pilotage de la mise en œuvre des programmes existants et identification, planification et exécution de nouvelles opportunités d'amélioration à travers les marques en collaboration avec le réseau de parties prenantes internes, le tout en étroite conformité avec les opportunités d'éco-modulation prévoyées globalement par la réglementation. - Soutien aux marques VF et aux équipes commerciales dans la réalisation d'enquêtes de durabilité produit et des demandes de données pour les partenaires commerciaux clés. - Conseil aux marques VF sur les allégations environnementales et la communication, en assurant la conformité aux exigences réglementaires en EMEA (y compris, mais sans s'y limiter, la directive Empowering Consumers for the Green Transition). - Soutien à l'équipe dans l'intégration des principes de l'économie circulaire dans les activités quotidiennes, y compris le soutien à la collecte de données pour garantir la conformité à la réglementation Ecodesign for Sustainable Products (ESPR) et à la directive Corporate Sustainability Reporting (CSRD). - Surveiller en continu l'évolution du paysage des exigences réglementaires axées sur la durabilité à l'échelle mondiale. - Soutien à l'organisation de l'équipe, à la planification et aux tâches opérationnelles quotidiennes. ## Relations de travail critiques - Travailler horizontalement à travers les fonctions internes, y compris mais sans s'y limiter, Global Sustainability, Legal, Brand Marketing, Brand Product & Sales teams, Finance, Government Affairs, Supply Chain, Product Stewardship team ainsi que les parties prenantes externes. - Travailler en étroite collaboration avec Corporate & Government Affairs et Legal Counsel pour intégrer en continu les développements réglementaires dans le processus opérationnel de VF. ## Compétences requises - Quelques années d'expérience professionnelle en durabilité, une expérience dans l'industrie textile est un plus. - Maîtrise de l'anglais avec d'excellentes compétences verbales et écrites. - Excellentes compétences analytiques et pensée de processus pour traduire des problèmes complexes en solutions tangibles et rationalisées. - Expertise approfondie en collecte et analyse de données, gestion de processus et gestion de projets. - Capacité à soutenir et prioriser avec succès plusieurs projets et équipes simultanément. - Esprit pionnier et confiance dans sa capacité à explorer des territoires inexplorés. - Communicateur fort qui apprécie travailler avec les gens. - Intérêt marqué pour la durabilité, le changement climatique et les défis environnementaux complexes et interconnectés auxquels notre industrie et au-delà sont confrontés. ## À propos de VF VF est une entreprise mondiale de vêtements qui connecte les gens aux styles de vie qu'ils chérissent grâce à notre famille de marques emblématiques. Au cœur de notre parcours se trouve notre objectif : nous alimentons les mouvements de modes de vie durables et actifs pour le bien des personnes et de notre planète. C'est notre objectif. Ce qu'il y a pour vous : nous sommes dans le métier de libérer le potentiel humain, guidés par les idées, l'énergie et l'engagement de nos collaborateurs. C'est pourquoi nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien-être mental, physique et financier de tous les collaborateurs VF. En matière d'avantages, nous sommes le package complet. ## Ce que nous offrons - Une culture de soutien basée sur le feedback où le respect et l'intégrité nous guident dans ce que nous faisons. - Un environnement international inclusif où les personnes de divers horizons, modes de vie et nationalités aiment travailler ensemble. - Faire partie d'une marque de style de vie emblématique dans une organisation multi-marques, multi-pays. - Gym sur place offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être. - Une carte de réduction de 50 % sur toutes les marques VF. - Espaces de détente proposant des boissons chaudes gratuites. ## Libre d'être, Inclusion & Diversité En tant qu'employeur garantissant l'égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d'appartenance fondée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs, leur permettant d'apporter leur véritable moi au travail chaque jour. ## Contact Si vous avez apprécié ce que vous avez lu et souhaitez rejoindre notre équipe, nous aimerions avoir de vos nouvelles ! #Readytoapply R-20260216-0005

jobs.title: Global Product Developer
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF2
jobs.description: icebreaker are looking for a Global Product Developer to join the product creation team in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s Talk About the Role As Global Product Developer , you will be accountable for the execution of icebreaker products through the GTM process from concept to finished goods, ensuring alignment with brand strategy, global business needs, sourcing capabilities, and quality standards. This role plays a critical part in the tactical execution of industry‑leading product to design intent, collaborating cross‑functionally with a multi‑season time horizon. As a key member of the product creation team, you will support and enable the Manager, Global Product Development in implementing best practices and processes, applying technical know‑how to turn product concepts into reality and drive business growth. ## ## How You Will Make a Difference ## • Concept Translation & Technical Realisation - Work closely with Design and Merchandising to interpret and validate creative concepts and align on desired outcomes (Style & GM%). - Translate concepts into comprehensive technical specifications and production strategies, from capability trials to bulk. - Ensure ideas are effectively translated into products that meet strategic and commercial objectives. ## • End-to-End Product Excellence - Prepare detailed product tech packs: specifications, materials, sizing, construction, schematics, and QC protocols. - Ensure accurate realisation of design intent in manufacturing. - Proactively identify process and manufacturing improvements, focusing on quality and finish. ## • Cross-Functional Collaboration - Act as a liaison between internal teams (Materials, Design, Technical Design, Merchandising) and external partners (Sourcing, Vendors, Quality). - Build strong working relationships to ensure alignment on strategy, timelines, and quality benchmarks. ## • Project Management - Manage timelines for seasonal and non-seasonal products, following critical paths and ensuring on‑time delivery of prototypes, SMS, and bulk. - Apply agile methodologies and troubleshoot proactively to ensure timely, high‑quality, and cost‑effective execution. - Support Quality Control in reviewing finished goods against factory standards. ## • Data Management & Reporting - Maintain the PLM system with up-to-date product data, ensuring accuracy and on-time seasonal inputs/outputs (specs, timelines, revisions, costings). - Ensure seamless information flow across Product Creation and Manufacturing teams. ## • Product Costing - Develop and manage cost models toward predetermined GM% targets. - Collaborate with Merchandising and Sourcing to meet financial parameters without compromising quality or sustainability. - Complete technical specifications enabling vendors to execute efficiently for SMS and Bulk. ## • Continuous Improvement & Feedback - Analyze market feedback and product performance to refine products and influence future development. - Seek opportunities for personal growth, with a focus on product category expertise ## Skills for Success - Ability to identify emerging trends in outdoor performance and sustainable apparel. - Use forward‑thinking to keep icebreaker at the forefront of the industry. - Strong commitment to sustainability, ethical production, attention to detail, and high-quality execution. - Solid understanding of garment construction, technical specs, and sustainable development practices. - Proficiency in detailed tech packs and PLM systems (Flex, Enovia). - Experience managing cost models in a dynamic environment. - Proven success in cross-functional teamwork. - Ability to partner effectively with Merchandising, Design, Technical Design, and external stakeholders. - Ability to articulate technical details clearly to both technical and non‑technical partners. - Confident negotiator with internal and external stakeholders. - Capable of prioritizing workload across multi‑phase projects. - Comfortable working and traveling internationally, occasionally during early mornings or evenings. - Strong time management and interpersonal skills. - Embraces an inclusive, respectful culture and handles conflict with objectivity and calm. ## Education & Experience - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Product Development, Industrial Design, or related field. - Certifications in sustainable production or project management are a plus. - Proficiency in Microsoft Office and Adobe CC , and experience with PLM systems such as Flex and Enovia. - Several years of product development/technical experience in the apparel industry; outdoor performance or sustainable apparel experience strongly preferred. ## About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It’s the reason we come to work every day. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at http://vfc.com ## What’s in It for You - A supportive, feedback‑based culture guided by respect and integrity - An inclusive, international environment celebrating diverse backgrounds - Opportunity to be part of an iconic lifestyle brand within a multi-brand, multi‑country organization - On‑site gym with wellbeing initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands - Break‑out areas with complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. ## #readytoapply R-20260130-0006

descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione icebreaker are looking for a Global Product Developer to join the product creation team in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s Talk About the Role As Global Product Developer , you will be accountable for the execution of icebreaker products through the GTM process from concept to finished goods, ensuring alignment with brand strategy, global business needs, sourcing capabilities, and quality standards. This role plays a critical part in the tactical execution of industry‑leading product to design intent, collaborating cross‑functionally with a multi‑season time horizon. As a key member of the product creation team, you will support and enable the Manager, Global Product Development in implementing best practices and processes, applying technical know‑how to turn product concepts into reality and drive business growth. ## Mansioni - Concept Translation & Technical Realisation - Work closely with Design and Merchandising to interpret and validate creative concepts and align on desired outcomes (Style & GM%). - Translate concepts into comprehensive technical specifications and production strategies, from capability trials to bulk. - Ensure ideas are effectively translated into products that meet strategic and commercial objectives. - End-to-End Product Excellence - Prepare detailed product tech packs: specifications, materials, sizing, construction, schematics, and QC protocols. - Ensure accurate realisation of design intent in manufacturing. - Proactively identify process and manufacturing improvements, focusing on quality and finish. - Cross-Functional Collaboration - Act as a liaison between internal teams (Materials, Design, Technical Design, Merchandising) and external partners (Sourcing, Vendors, Quality). - Build strong working relationships to ensure alignment on strategy, timelines, and quality benchmarks. - Project Management - Manage timelines for seasonal and non-seasonal products, following critical paths and ensuring on‑time delivery of prototypes, SMS, and bulk. - Apply agile methodologies and troubleshoot proactively to ensure timely, high‑quality, and cost‑effective execution. - Support Quality Control in reviewing finished goods against factory standards. - Data Management & Reporting - Maintain the PLM system with up-to-date product data, ensuring accuracy and on-time seasonal inputs/outputs (specs, timelines, revisions, costings). - Ensure seamless information flow across Product Creation and Manufacturing teams. - Product Costing - Develop and manage cost models toward predetermined GM% targets. - Collaborate with Merchandising and Sourcing to meet financial parameters without compromising quality or sustainability. - Complete technical specifications enabling vendors to execute efficiently for SMS and Bulk. - Continuous Improvement & Feedback - Analyze market feedback and product performance to refine products and influence future development. - Seek opportunities for personal growth, with a focus on product category expertise. ## Requisiti - Ability to identify emerging trends in outdoor performance and sustainable apparel. - Use forward‑thinking to keep icebreaker at the forefront of the industry. - Strong commitment to sustainability, ethical production, attention to detail, and high-quality execution. - Solid understanding of garment construction, technical specs, and sustainable development practices. - Proficiency in detailed tech packs and PLM systems (Flex, Enovia). - Experience managing cost models in a dynamic environment. - Proven success in cross-functional teamwork. - Ability to partner effectively with Merchandising, Design, Technical Design, and external stakeholders. - Ability to articulate technical details clearly to both technical and non‑technical partners. - Confident negotiator with internal and external stakeholders. - Capable of prioritizing workload across multi‑phase projects. - Comfortable working and traveling internationally, occasionally during early mornings or evenings. - Strong time management and interpersonal skills. - Embraces an inclusive, respectful culture and handles conflict with objectivity and calm. - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Product Development, Industrial Design, or related field. - Certifications in sustainable production or project management are a plus. - Proficiency in Microsoft Office and Adobe CC , and experience with PLM systems such as Flex and Enovia. - Several years of product development/technical experience in the apparel industry; outdoor performance or sustainable apparel experience strongly preferred. ## Cosa offriamo - A supportive, feedback‑based culture guided by respect and integrity - An inclusive, international environment celebrating diverse backgrounds - Opportunity to be part of an iconic lifestyle brand within a multi-brand, multi‑country organization - On‑site gym with wellbeing initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands - Break‑out areas with complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. ## Contatto #readytoapply R-20260130-0006
descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione icebreaker è alla ricerca di un Sviluppatore Prodotto Globale da inserire nel team di creazione prodotto a Stabio, Svizzera. Parliamo del ruolo: come Sviluppatore Prodotto Globale, sarai responsabile dell’esecuzione dei prodotti icebreaker attraverso il processo GTM dal concetto al prodotto finito, garantendo l’allineamento con la strategia del brand, le esigenze globali di business, le capacità di approvvigionamento e gli standard di qualità. Questo ruolo è fondamentale nell’esecuzione tattica di prodotti leader del settore rispetto all’intento di design, collaborando in modo trasversale con un orizzonte temporale multi‑stagionale. Come membro chiave del team di creazione prodotto, supporterai e abiliterai il Manager, Global Product Development nell’implementare le migliori pratiche e processi, applicando le competenze tecniche per trasformare i concetti di prodotto in realtà e guidare la crescita del business. ## Mansioni - Traduzione del concetto e realizzazione tecnica – Lavorare a stretto contatto con Design e Merchandising per interpretare e convalidare i concetti creativi e allinearsi sugli esiti desiderati (Stile & GM%). - Tradurre i concetti in specifiche tecniche complete e strategie di produzione, dalle prove di capacità al bulk. - Garantire che le idee siano tradotte efficacemente in prodotti che soddisfino gli obiettivi strategici e commerciali. - Eccellenza prodotto end‑to‑end – Preparare tech pack dettagliati del prodotto: specifiche, materiali, dimensioni, costruzione, schemi e protocolli di QC. - Assicurare la realizzazione accurata dell’intento di design nella produzione. - Identificare proattivamente miglioramenti di processo e produzione, focalizzandosi su qualità e finitura. - Collaborazione cross‑funzionale – Agire da collegamento tra team interni (Materiali, Design, Design Tecnico, Merchandising) e partner esterni (Sourcing, Fornitori, Qualità). - Costruire solide relazioni di lavoro per garantire l’allineamento su strategia, tempistiche e benchmark di qualità. - Gestione progetti – Gestire le tempistiche per prodotti stagionali e non stagionali, seguendo i percorsi critici e garantendo la consegna puntuale di prototipi, SMS e bulk. - Applicare metodologie agili e risolvere proattivamente i problemi per garantire un’esecuzione tempestiva, di alta qualità e costo‑efficiente. - Supportare il controllo qualità nella revisione dei prodotti finiti rispetto agli standard di fabbrica. - Gestione dati e reporting – Mantenere il sistema PLM con dati prodotto aggiornati, garantendo precisione e input/output stagionali puntuali (specifiche, tempistiche, revisioni, costi). - Assicurare un flusso informativo senza interruzioni tra i team di Creazione Prodotto e Produzione. - Calcolo dei costi prodotto – Sviluppare e gestire modelli di costo verso gli obiettivi di GM% prefissati. - Collaborare con Merchandising e Sourcing per rispettare i parametri finanziari senza compromettere qualità o sostenibilità. - Fornire specifiche tecniche complete per consentire ai fornitori di eseguire efficientemente SMS e Bulk. - Miglioramento continuo e feedback – Analizzare il feedback di mercato e le performance del prodotto per perfezionare i prodotti e influenzare lo sviluppo futuro. - Cercare opportunità di crescita personale, con focus sull’expertise di categoria prodotto. ## Requisiti - Capacità di identificare tendenze emergenti nelle prestazioni outdoor e nell’abbigliamento sostenibile. - Utilizzare una visione proiettata al futuro per mantenere icebreaker all’avanguardia del settore. - Forte impegno verso la sostenibilità, produzione etica, attenzione ai dettagli e esecuzione di alta qualità. - Solida comprensione della costruzione dei capi, specifiche tecniche e pratiche di sviluppo sostenibile. - Competenza in tech pack dettagliati e sistemi PLM (Flex, Enovia). - Esperienza nella gestione di modelli di costo in un ambiente dinamico. - Successo comprovato nel lavoro di squadra trasversale. - Capacità di collaborare efficacemente con Merchandising, Design, Design Tecnico e stakeholder esterni. - Capacità di articolare chiaramente i dettagli tecnici a partner tecnici e non tecnici. - Negoziante sicuro con stakeholder interni ed esterni. - Capacità di dare priorità al carico di lavoro su progetti multi‑fase. - Disponibilità a lavorare e viaggiare a livello internazionale, occasionalmente al mattino presto o sera. - Ottime capacità di gestione del tempo e abilità interpersonali. - Abbracciare una cultura inclusiva e rispettosa e gestire i conflitti con obiettività e calma. - Laurea triennale o magistrale in Sviluppo Prodotto, Design Industriale o campo correlato. - Certificazioni in produzione sostenibile o gestione progetti sono un plus. - Competenza in Microsoft Office e Adobe CC, e esperienza con sistemi PLM come Flex e Enovia. - Diverse anni di esperienza in sviluppo/tecnica prodotto nell’industria dell’abbigliamento; esperienza in performance outdoor o abbigliamento sostenibile fortemente preferita. ## Cosa offriamo - Una cultura di supporto e feedback guidata da rispetto e integrità - Un ambiente internazionale e inclusivo che celebra background diversi - Opportunità di far parte di un brand iconico all’interno di un’organizzazione multi‑brand e multi‑paese - Palestra in sede con iniziative di benessere - Sconto del 50% su tutti i brand VF - Aree break‑out con bevande calde gratuite - Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging - Come datore di lavoro pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri collaboratori, permettendo loro di portare il proprio sé autentico al lavoro ogni giorno. ## Contatto #readytoapply R-20260130-0006
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung icebreaker sucht einen Global Product Developer, der dem Produktentwicklungsteam in Stabio, Schweiz beitritt. Lassen Sie uns über die Rolle sprechen: Als Global Product Developer sind Sie verantwortlich für die Umsetzung der icebreaker‑Produkte durch den GTM‑Prozess von der Idee bis zum fertigen Produkt und stellen die Übereinstimmung mit der Markenstrategie, den globalen Geschäftsanforderungen, den Beschaffungsfähigkeiten und den Qualitätsstandards sicher. Diese Position spielt eine entscheidende Rolle bei der taktischen Umsetzung von branchenführenden Produkten gemäß Design‑Intention, in Zusammenarbeit über mehrere Saisons hinweg. Als Schlüsselmitglied des Produktentwicklungsteams unterstützen Sie den Manager, Global Product Development bei der Implementierung von Best Practices und Prozessen, wenden technisches Know‑how an, um Produktkonzepte in die Realität umzusetzen und das Unternehmenswachstum zu fördern. ## Aufgaben - Konzeptübersetzung & technische Realisierung – Eng eng mit Design und Merchandising zusammenarbeiten, um kreative Konzepte zu interpretieren und zu validieren und sich auf gewünschte Ergebnisse (Style & GM%) abzustimmen. - Konzepte in umfassende technische Spezifikationen und Produktionsstrategien übersetzen, von Fähigkeitstests bis zum Bulk. - Sicherstellen, dass Ideen effektiv in Produkte übersetzt werden, die strategische und kommerzielle Ziele erfüllen. - End‑to‑End Produkt‑Exzellenz – Detaillierte Produkt‑Tech‑Packs erstellen: Spezifikationen, Materialien, Größen, Konstruktion, Schemata und QC‑Protokolle. - Genauigkeit der Design‑Intention in der Fertigung sicherstellen. - Proaktiv Prozess‑ und Fertigungsverbesserungen identifizieren, mit Fokus auf Qualität und Verarbeitung. - Funktionsübergreifende Zusammenarbeit – Als Bindeglied zwischen internen Teams (Materialien, Design, Technisches Design, Merchandising) und externen Partnern (Sourcing, Lieferanten, Qualität) fungieren. - Starke Arbeitsbeziehungen aufbauen, um die Ausrichtung auf Strategie, Zeitpläne und Qualitätsmaßstäbe zu gewährleisten. - Projektmanagement – Zeitpläne für saisonale und nicht‑saisonale Produkte verwalten, kritische Pfade verfolgen und die termingerechte Lieferung von Prototypen, SMS und Bulk sicherstellen. - Agile Methoden anwenden und proaktiv Probleme lösen, um eine zeitnahe, hochwertige und kosteneffiziente Ausführung zu gewährleisten. - Qualitätskontrolle unterstützen bei der Überprüfung fertiger Waren gegenüber Fabrikstandards. - Datenmanagement & Reporting – Das PLM‑System mit aktuellen Produktdaten pflegen, Genauigkeit und termingerechte saisonale Eingaben/Ausgaben (Spezifikationen, Zeitpläne, Revisionen, Kosten) sicherstellen. - Nahtlosen Informationsfluss zwischen Produktentwicklung und Fertigungsteams gewährleisten. - Produktkalkulation – Kostenmodelle entwickeln und verwalten, um vorgegebene GM%‑Ziele zu erreichen. - Mit Merchandising und Sourcing zusammenarbeiten, um finanzielle Parameter zu erfüllen, ohne Qualität oder Nachhaltigkeit zu beeinträchtigen. - Vollständige technische Spezifikationen bereitstellen, damit Lieferanten SMS und Bulk effizient ausführen können. - Kontinuierliche Verbesserung & Feedback – Marktfeedback und Produktleistung analysieren, um Produkte zu verfeinern und zukünftige Entwicklungen zu beeinflussen. - Möglichkeiten zur persönlichen Weiterentwicklung suchen, mit Fokus auf Fachwissen in der Produktkategorie. ## Anforderungen - Fähigkeit, aufkommende Trends im Outdoor‑Performance‑ und nachhaltigen Bekleidungsbereich zu erkennen. - Vorausschauendes Denken einsetzen, um icebreaker an der Branchenfront zu halten. - Starkes Engagement für Nachhaltigkeit, ethische Produktion, Detailgenauigkeit und hochwertige Ausführung. - Solides Verständnis von Bekleidungsherstellung, technischen Spezifikationen und nachhaltigen Entwicklungspraktiken. - Kompetenz in detaillierten Tech‑Packs und PLM‑Systemen (Flex, Enovia). - Erfahrung in der Verwaltung von Kostenmodellen in einem dynamischen Umfeld. - Nachweislicher Erfolg in funktionsübergreifender Teamarbeit. - Fähigkeit, effektiv mit Merchandising, Design, Technischem Design und externen Stakeholdern zusammenzuarbeiten. - Fähigkeit, technische Details klar sowohl technischen als auch nicht‑technischen Partnern zu vermitteln. - Selbstbewusster Verhandler mit internen und externen Stakeholdern. - Fähigkeit, Arbeitslast über mehrphasige Projekte zu priorisieren. - Bereitschaft, international zu arbeiten und zu reisen, gelegentlich früh morgens oder abends. - Starke Zeitmanagement‑ und zwischenmenschliche Fähigkeiten. - Eine inklusive, respektvolle Kultur leben und Konflikte objektiv und ruhig behandeln. - Bachelor‑ oder Masterabschluss in Produktentwicklung, Industriedesign oder einem verwandten Bereich. - Zertifizierungen in nachhaltiger Produktion oder Projektmanagement sind von Vorteil. - Kompetenz in Microsoft Office und Adobe CC sowie Erfahrung mit PLM‑Systemen wie Flex und Enovia. - Mehrjährige Erfahrung in Produktentwicklung/Technik in der Bekleidungsindustrie; Erfahrung im Outdoor‑Performance‑ oder nachhaltigen Bekleidungsbereich stark bevorzugt. ## Was wir bieten - Eine unterstützende, feedback‑basierte Kultur, geleitet von Respekt und Integrität - Ein inklusives, internationales Umfeld, das unterschiedliche Hintergründe feiert - Möglichkeit, Teil einer ikonischen Lifestyle‑Marke innerhalb einer Multi‑Brand, Multi‑Country Organisation zu sein - Vor Ort Fitnessstudio mit Wellness‑Initiativen - 50 % Rabatt auf alle VF‑Marken - Break‑out‑Bereiche mit kostenlosen Heißgetränken - Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging - Als Arbeitgeber mit gleichen Chancen setzen wir uns dafür ein, eine Kultur des Zugehörigkeitsgefühls zu fördern, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir verpflichten uns, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen und zu erhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeitenden feiert und es ihnen ermöglicht, ihr authentisches Selbst jeden Tag zur Arbeit zu bringen. ## Kontakt #readytoapply R-20260130-0006
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description icebreaker recherche un Global Product Developer pour rejoindre l’équipe de création produit à Stabio, Suisse. Parlons du rôle : En tant que Global Product Developer, vous serez responsable de l’exécution des produits icebreaker à travers le processus GTM du concept au produit fini, en assurant l’alignement avec la stratégie de la marque, les besoins commerciaux globaux, les capacités d’approvisionnement et les normes de qualité. Ce rôle joue un rôle crucial dans l’exécution tactique de produits leaders de l’industrie conformément à l’intention de conception, en collaborant de manière transversale avec un horizon temporel multi‑saisonnier. En tant que membre clé de l’équipe de création produit, vous soutiendrez et permettrez au Manager, Global Product Development de mettre en œuvre les meilleures pratiques et processus, en appliquant le savoir‑faire technique pour transformer les concepts de produit en réalité et stimuler la croissance de l’entreprise. ## Missions - Traduction du concept & réalisation technique – Travailler en étroite collaboration avec le Design et le Merchandising pour interpréter et valider les concepts créatifs et s’aligner sur les résultats souhaités (Style & GM%). - Traduire les concepts en spécifications techniques complètes et stratégies de production, des essais de capacité au bulk. - Veiller à ce que les idées soient efficacement traduites en produits répondant aux objectifs stratégiques et commerciaux. - Excellence produit de bout en bout – Préparer des tech packs détaillés du produit : spécifications, matériaux, tailles, construction, schémas et protocoles QC. - Garantir la réalisation précise de l’intention de conception en fabrication. - Identifier de manière proactive les améliorations de processus et de fabrication, en se concentrant sur la qualité et la finition. - Collaboration transversale – Servir d’intermédiaire entre les équipes internes (Matériaux, Design, Design Technique, Merchandising) et les partenaires externes (Sourcing, Fournisseurs, Qualité). - Construire de solides relations de travail pour assurer l’alignement sur la stratégie, les délais et les références de qualité. - Gestion de projet – Gérer les calendriers pour les produits saisonniers et non saisonniers, suivre les chemins critiques et assurer la livraison à temps des prototypes, SMS et bulk. - Appliquer des méthodologies agiles et résoudre de manière proactive les problèmes afin d’assurer une exécution rapide, de haute qualité et rentable. - Soutenir le contrôle qualité dans la révision des produits finis par rapport aux normes d’usine. - Gestion des données & reporting – Maintenir le système PLM avec des données produit à jour, garantissant précision et entrées/sorties saisonnières ponctuelles (spécifications, calendriers, révisions, coûts). - Assurer un flux d’information fluide entre les équipes de création produit et de fabrication. - Calcul des coûts produit – Développer et gérer des modèles de coûts pour atteindre les objectifs de GM% prédéfinis. - Collaborer avec le Merchandising et le Sourcing pour respecter les paramètres financiers sans compromettre la qualité ou la durabilité. - Fournir des spécifications techniques complètes permettant aux fournisseurs d’exécuter efficacement les SMS et le bulk. - Amélioration continue & feedback – Analyser les retours du marché et les performances du produit pour affiner les produits et influencer le développement futur. - Rechercher des opportunités de croissance personnelle, en se concentrant sur l’expertise de catégorie produit. ## Exigences - Capacité à identifier les tendances émergentes dans la performance outdoor et les vêtements durables. - Utiliser une vision prospective pour maintenir icebreaker à la pointe de l’industrie. - Fort engagement envers la durabilité, la production éthique, l’attention aux détails et une exécution de haute qualité. - Solide compréhension de la construction des vêtements, des spécifications techniques et des pratiques de développement durable. - Maîtrise des tech packs détaillés et des systèmes PLM (Flex, Enovia). - Expérience dans la gestion de modèles de coûts dans un environnement dynamique. - Succès avéré dans le travail d’équipe interfonctionnel. - Capacité à collaborer efficacement avec le Merchandising, le Design, le Design Technique et les parties prenantes externes. - Capacité à articuler clairement les détails techniques aux partenaires techniques et non techniques. - Négociateur confiant avec les parties prenantes internes et externes. - Capacité à prioriser la charge de travail sur des projets multi‑phases. - À l’aise pour travailler et voyager à l’international, occasionnellement tôt le matin ou le soir. - Excellentes compétences en gestion du temps et en relations interpersonnelles. - Adopter une culture inclusive et respectueuse et gérer les conflits avec objectivité et calme. - Licence ou Master en développement produit, design industriel ou domaine connexe. - Les certifications en production durable ou en gestion de projet sont un plus. - Maîtrise de Microsoft Office et Adobe CC, ainsi que l’expérience des systèmes PLM tels que Flex et Enovia. - Plusieurs années d’expérience en développement/technique produit dans l’industrie du vêtement ; une expérience en performance outdoor ou en vêtements durables est fortement préférée. ## Ce que nous offrons - Une culture de soutien et de feedback guidée par le respect et l’intégrité - Un environnement international et inclusif célébrant la diversité des parcours - Opportunité de faire partie d’une marque emblématique au sein d’une organisation multi‑marques et multi‑pays - Salle de sport sur site avec initiatives bien‑être - 50 % de remise sur toutes les marques VF - Espaces de détente avec boissons chaudes gratuites - Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging - En tant qu’employeur garantissant l’égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d’appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l’ouverture et l’authenticité. Nous nous engageons à créer et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs, leur permettant d’apporter leur vrai moi chaque jour. ## Contact #readytoapply R-20260130-0006

jobs.title: PSS Analyst - THE NORTH FACE
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: The North Face EMEA is looking for an outstanding PSS Analyst to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Focus of this role will be on Retail Partner and Concession channel, with the key objective to create and implement new ways of working to elevate our Merchandise Planning and Trading aligned with the DTC business. You will be responsible for merchandise trading including all inventory management and Retail KPIs management and cross-functional go-to-market alignment and performance tracking. Also, you will play a key role to further strengthen our Retail Partner business in ITALY and GAS region, working closely with our Retail and Concession manager throughout the selling campaign. How you will make a difference - Lead and evolve best-in-class digital Merchandising Planning process fully aligned with our DTC strategy, positioning and with the seasonal merchandising strategy; - Full ownership to manage the performance of the defined assortment, working closely with a cross-functional team dedicated to B&M (Buyers and Retail Partner managers) ; - Work alongside our TNG buying team and PSS managers to manage seasonal, monthly and weekly intake requirements; - Working on Inventory Management and coverage optimization at product/size level and across our DCs, with focus on trading performance and stock level optimization, delivering against The North Face B&M and financial objectives; - Full alignment with overall go-to-market calendar to ensure seamless execution and strong accelerated growth; - Working in partnership with Buying, PSS and Sales Ops team on the development of yearly and seasonal merchandise financial plans across Revenue, COGS, Discounts, Margins, ASP and Units - Set standards of trading and buying processes and deliver best practices to be shared across our cross-functional teams, proactively proposing continuous improvements in processes and tools in collaboration with DTC counterparts and VF Central Team to reach trading excellence and best-in-class inventory management execution; - Constantly striving for innovation and to optimise ways of working by contributing in setting up new processes, tools and report. What you need to succeed? - 3+ yrs. of relevant work experience with proven track record in Merchandising Planning, trading or equivalent Business Planning/Trading role - Language skills: fluent in English and Italian - Relevant Merchandise Planning and analysis experience within a fast-paced retail business - Deep understanding of the fast-paced B&M environment and merchandising success factors for Retails - Outstanding understanding of all the Retail KPIs and how they are influencing stores’ P&L - Excellent knowledge of Excel. Knowledge of Access, SAP and BI systems is a plus. - Excellent analytical skills - Outstanding business- and financial acumen - Consumer-first, data savvy and brand-driven mindset - Highly performance driven and result-oriented team player who is getting things done - High maturity in managing organisational complexity and effective communication - Strategic and operational decision-making A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in related fields are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements. What is in it for you? - Playing a key role to accelerate our B&M growth within one of our leading brands - Joining an ambitious Retail and Concession team embedded into The North Face and VF, one of the largest, globally leading multi-brand organisations with great long-term career opportunities - Purpose-led, international, fun and challenging working environment We're in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That's why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we're the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose-led, performance driven company, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Join the North Face Family The North Face was built on a love for the outdoors and the desire to enable all types of exploration, for all people, from their backyards to the Himalayas. Over the last 50 years we've lived by our "true north," the belief that exploration has the power to change us, to challenge us and to help us see the world from new perspectives. To help ignite a global movement of outdoor exploration, love for the natural world and an unwavering commitment to protect it, we welcome and encourage new participants to the outdoors. We extend our reach through support of non-profit organizations, establishing programs that connect participants with close-to-home recreation opportunities, and creating a connection with young leaders, inspiring them to explore and conserve. As we enter our sixth decade, we pledge to: - Empower exploration and the thrill of the unknown for as many people as possible - Protect the places where we live, play, and operate - Evolve the way we make our products by improving our environmental performance and social responsibility in the supply chain Our Parent Company, VF Corporation VF is one of the world's largest apparel, footwear and accessories companies connecting people to the lifestyles, activities and experiences they cherish through our family of iconic outdoor, active and workwear brands. At the heart of our journey lies our company-wide purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It's the reason we come to work every day. It's a commitment shared by our global associates across all brands. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! Please submit your application in English, as that's our common language! R-20230303-0011

titleByLocale.en: PSS Analyst - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.it: Analista PSS - THE NORTH FACE
titleByLocale.fr: Analyste PSS - THE NORTH FACE

descriptionByLocale.en: The North Face EMEA is looking for an outstanding PSS Analyst to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Focus of this role will be on Retail Partner and Concession channel, with the key objective to create and implement new ways of working to elevate our Merchandise Planning and Trading aligned with the DTC business. You will be responsible for merchandise trading including all inventory management and Retail KPIs management and cross-functional go-to-market alignment and performance tracking. Also, you will play a key role to further strengthen our Retail Partner business in ITALY and GAS region, working closely with our Retail and Concession manager throughout the selling campaign. How you will make a difference - Lead and evolve best-in-class digital Merchandising Planning process fully aligned with our DTC strategy, positioning and with the seasonal merchandising strategy; - Full ownership to manage the performance of the defined assortment, working closely with a cross-functional team dedicated to B&M (Buyers and Retail Partner managers) ; - Work alongside our TNG buying team and PSS managers to manage seasonal, monthly and weekly intake requirements; - Working on Inventory Management and coverage optimization at product/size level and across our DCs, with focus on trading performance and stock level optimization, delivering against The North Face B&M and financial objectives; - Full alignment with overall go-to-market calendar to ensure seamless execution and strong accelerated growth; - Working in partnership with Buying, PSS and Sales Ops team on the development of yearly and seasonal merchandise financial plans across Revenue, COGS, Discounts, Margins, ASP and Units - Set standards of trading and buying processes and deliver best practices to be shared across our cross-functional teams, proactively proposing continuous improvements in processes and tools in collaboration with DTC counterparts and VF Central Team to reach trading excellence and best-in-class inventory management execution; - Constantly striving for innovation and to optimise ways of working by contributing in setting up new processes, tools and report. What you need to succeed? - 3+ yrs. of relevant work experience with proven track record in Merchandising Planning, trading or equivalent Business Planning/Trading role - Language skills: fluent in English and Italian - Relevant Merchandise Planning and analysis experience within a fast-paced retail business - Deep understanding of the fast-paced B&M environment and merchandising success factors for Retails - Outstanding understanding of all the Retail KPIs and how they are influencing stores’ P&L - Excellent knowledge of Excel. Knowledge of Access, SAP and BI systems is a plus. - Excellent analytical skills - Outstanding business- and financial acumen - Consumer-first, data savvy and brand-driven mindset - Highly performance driven and result-oriented team player who is getting things done - High maturity in managing organisational complexity and effective communication - Strategic and operational decision-making A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in related fields are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements. What is in it for you? - Playing a key role to accelerate our B&M growth within one of our leading brands - Joining an ambitious Retail and Concession team embedded into The North Face and VF, one of the largest, globally leading multi-brand organisations with great long-term career opportunities - Purpose-led, international, fun and challenging working environment We're in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That's why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we're the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose-led, performance driven company, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Join the North Face Family The North Face was built on a love for the outdoors and the desire to enable all types of exploration, for all people, from their backyards to the Himalayas. Over the last 50 years we've lived by our "true north," the belief that exploration has the power to change us, to challenge us and to help us see the world from new perspectives. To help ignite a global movement of outdoor exploration, love for the natural world and an unwavering commitment to protect it, we welcome and encourage new participants to the outdoors. We extend our reach through support of non-profit organizations, establishing programs that connect participants with close-to-home recreation opportunities, and creating a connection with young leaders, inspiring them to explore and conserve. As we enter our sixth decade, we pledge to: - Empower exploration and the thrill of the unknown for as many people as possible - Protect the places where we live, play, and operate - Evolve the way we make our products by improving our environmental performance and social responsibility in the supply chain Our Parent Company, VF Corporation VF is one of the world's largest apparel, footwear and accessories companies connecting people to the lifestyles, activities and experiences they cherish through our family of iconic outdoor, active and workwear brands.
